## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New detection rule

## Checklist

- [ ] `make ci` passes locally (`go vet` + tests)
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `CHANGELOG.md` if user-facing
- [ ] No real secrets included in tests or fixtures (use obviously-fake values)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
